title: ficus subulata var. tadjam
intro: Ficus subulata var. tadjam, also known as the Tadjam Ficus or Ficus Tadjam, is a variety of tree in the fig family (Moraceae) native to Madagascar. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Ficus subulata var. tadjam include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from fever and cold symptoms. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal remedies, such as decoctions and infusions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
